title: Workplace update
subtitle: Give a simple work update.
overview: A2 workplace Spanish is about status, time, and next steps.
Use ya, todavía, falta, voy a.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: I am going to send it today.

items.es: Ya terminé la primera parte del informe.
items.en: I already finished the first part of the report.
I am still reviewing the details.
One answer from Ana is missing.

items.es: Voy a mandar el documento esta tarde.
items.en: I am going to send the document this afternoon.

items.es: Si hay un problema, te aviso.
items.en: If there is a problem, I will let you know.

lines.speaker: B
lines.es: Ya terminé casi todo, pero falta una parte.
lines.en: I already finished almost everything, but one part is missing.

lines.speaker: B
lines.es: Creo que podré mandarlo esta tarde.
lines.en: I think I will be able to send it this afternoon.
